As we have already reported, there have been some major Nintendo leaks surfacing across the interwebs over the last week or so, much of which coming from folks with solid track records for this sort of thing. While these sorts of early details and rumors were very much expected last year with the launch of the Switch 2, it appears as though much of the Nintendo 2026 launch plans have leaked already.

items.title: Right now, 1-year Costco Gold Star Memberships come with a $20 Digital Shop Card
items.summary:
Sticking to a set budget may not be as easy as it used to be, but there might be one simple change you can make to help out. Instead of burning through half a tank of gas getting your shopping done all around town, try switching it up and running all your errands under one roof. Costco is a great option if you want to simplify how you shop, and right now, you can get a $20 Digital Costco Shop Card* with your Gold Star Membership one-year subscription, and it’s still only $65.

items.title: Marshall’s retro-modern Bluetooth speakers look as good as they sound, now up to $100 off
items.summary:
There are loads of portable Bluetooth speaker options out there, but the Marshall models have always stood out for me with solid sound quality and a wonderfully retro-modern look and feel. Pulling from its classic guitar amp designs, these are the sorts of speakers that sound as good as they look up on your shelf in my opinion and, depending on your setup, almost double as vintage-style home decor items at the same time. There are several models seeing price drops on Amazon right now in classic black, cream, and navy colorways to match your setup at up to $100 or more off. 

more…
